title: Persona-Based Copy Generator
scenario: Generate a persona-based copy in Markdown format for a tech startup targeting young professionals. The copy should include a brief introduction to the company, its mission, and its products. The output should be well-formatted and concise, within 200 words. The copy should also include a clear call to action and a sense of urgency.
constraints: Must include a clear call to action and a sense of urgency

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated copy adheres to the constraints of word limit and including a clear call to action and a sense of urgency.
Check if the generated Markdown syntax is correct and follows standard best practices.
Check if the generated copy has a clear and distinct persona, with language and tone suitable for young professionals.
